scripts.dev:cleanup: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and ($_.CommandLine -match 'next(\.js)?\s+dev' -or $_.CommandLine -match 'next\\dist\\server\\lib\\start-server\.js') } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; if (Test-Path 'src/frontend/.next/dev/lock') { Remove-Item 'src/frontend/.next/dev/lock' -Force }"
scripts.dev:debug: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:AUTH_DEBUG_SSO='true'; npx next dev src/frontend --webpack"
scripts.dev:sso: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:ENABLE_DEV_BYPASS='false'; npx next dev src/frontend --webpack"
